assertions: D12: Mobile responsive layout renders properly at 360 width with no horizontal overflow.

vision_verdict: pass. The page is successfully rendered for mobile users with a clean, single-column layout that fits the width perfectly. All text elements, including the platform title and the advisory notice, are properly aligned within the viewport, ensuring clear readability and a seamless user experience. The design efficiently communicates the site's current status, with text wrapping appropriately to maintain vertical flow and ensure the entire message is visible without requiring any side-to-side movement.
